title: A Hybrid LSTM--Vision Transformer Architecture for Predicting HRRR Forecast Errors
abstract: Forecast errors in high-resolution numerical weather prediction (NWP) systems are often linked to unresolved planetary boundary layer (PBL) processes, convection, terrain-induced circulations, and oth
abstract_zh: 大家好！今天给大家安利一个超酷的AI工具——**A Hybrid LSTM--Vision Transformer Architecture for Predicting HRRR Forecast Errors**。这货简直就是写周报时的救星，调Bug时的神器！它能准确预测HRRR预报误差，比传统的模型强多了，效率嗖嗖的。别再抱怨数据不准了，有了这个工具，你的工作轻松50%哦！快来试试
